Description: Re-platform to TypeScript Next.js + React with Postgres, real auth, Docker, and the routed Home/Shelves/Catalog/Profile experience.

Summary: Stand up Next.js App Router app in strict TypeScript

Summary: Define shared domain and API contract types
Description: Users (member/community), auth identities, sessions, media, library entries, activities, preferences; shared payload types. Requirements: 1.3,1.4,8.5

Summary: Port existing visual language into the front-end
Description: Brand, avatars, pills, typography, cover themes, color tokens; component structure for later re-skin. Requirements: 1.6,13.2
